title: Synthetic Treatment Effect Estimation

target.name: treatment_effect
target.description: Conditional treatment-effect estimate for each synthetic model-improvement unit.

feature_descriptions.pretrain_overlap: Overlap between the run data and pretraining mixture.
feature_descriptions.compute_budget: Relative compute budget for the run.
feature_descriptions.treatment: Observed adaptive-intervention assignment for training rows.
feature_descriptions.outcome: Observed post-run improvement for training rows.

domain_background: Estimate per-unit treatment effects from observed treatment/outcome rows in a synthetic observational study of model-improvement runs. Treatment assignment is confounded by observed run features. The scorer uses PEHE against hidden per-unit effects as the primary metric and also reports absolute percent error of the average treatment effect.
allowed_external_resources: Use public causal-inference, treatment-effect-estimation, and package documentation. Do not use hidden reference files.
